use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATMENT OF ADULTS INFECTED WITH HIV-1
TREATMENT OF HIV-1 INFECTION IN PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 12 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
TRUVADA is indicated in combination with other antiretroviral agents (such as non-
nucleoside reverse transcriptase inhibitors or protease inhibitors) for the treatment of HIV-1
infection in adults.
Additional important information regarding the use of TRUVADA for the treatment of HIV-1
infection:
•...

1.1 Treatment of HIV-1 Infection
TRUVADA is indicated in combination with other antiretroviral agents for the treatment of HIV-1
infection in adults and pediatric patients weighing at least 17 kg [see Clinical Studies (14)].
1.2 HIV-1 Pre-Exposure Prophylaxis (PrEP)
TRUVADA is indicated in at-risk a...

Use as part of a comprehensive prevention strategy including other
Treatment of HIV-1 Infection (1.1) 05/2018
prevention measures; strictly adhere to dosing schedule. (5.2)
HIV-1 Pre-Exposure Prophylaxis (PrEP) (1.2) 05/2018
 Management to reduce the risk of acquiring HIV-1 drug resistance:

1.1 Treatment of HIV-1 Infection
TRUVADA®, a combination of EMTRIVA® and VIREAD®, is indicated in combination
with other antiretroviral agents for the treatment of HIV-1 infection in adults and pediatric
patients weighing at least 17 kg. [See Dosage and Administration (2) and Clinical
Studies (14)]....
